base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of playfield_ui — a ui (hud_readout) from 1991 puyo puyo. Dual playfield (1P left vs 2P/CPU right) + score + next-piece preview. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Dual playfield (1P left vs 2P/CPU right) + score + next-piece preview
